Petition For Order Compelling Personal Representative To Act Or In The Alternative For Suspension Of Particular Powers Of The Personal Rept. And Appointment Of Special Admin. With Respect To Assets In The Channel Islands
Off Calendar Dec-06-2012 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Daniel Conrad and Elizabeth Hanowsky for Michael Paul Coe (Petitioner). Steven Weinkauf for San Francisco Public Administrator.

Counsel presented oral argument in support of their positions with regard to who has standing to collect the accounts in the Channel Islands. The Court granted the Petition to Appoint Special Administrator to marshall the assets in the Channel Islands and appointing Gene March as the Special Administrator (subject to receipt of revised order).

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Ella Yip. Bailiff: Deputy A. Payne.

Off Calendar Oct-27-2010 Continued To Dec-15-10 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Steven Weinkauff for Petitioner.

Mr. Weinkauff stated that there was a Deceased Heir in England, that he could not make that distribution until he received something from the Son, that he did a preliminary distribution and that the Deceased Heir's share was in a seperate account. The matter was continued to December 15, 2010 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy F. Smith.

Petition For Determination Of Entitlement To Distribution From The Estate Of Helen G. Watt
Off Calendar May-03-2010 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Daniel Conrad for Michael Coe (Petitioner).

The Court noted that Attorney Steven Weinkauf was not present. Mr. Conrad stated that he did not know if Vera Sargent had an Estate or not, and that he received information from Fraser and Fraser that Vera's son Clinton Sargent was alive in Africa but that he was unable to get any response. In addition, Mr. Conrad asked the Court to grant the petition and requested that the 1/4 interest be deposited with the County Treasurer and have the Public Administrator notify Clinton Sargent. The Court stated that it could order that Vera's interest be vested in her Estate and that any distribution be pursuant to Court order on the Public Administrator's petition for final distribution. The Court granted the petition (subject to a written order). Mr. Conrad will prepare a revised order. The Court also stated that it was still waiting for an order from the Public Administrator based on the September 21, 2009 petition. An Order to Show Cause will be issued to Attorney Steven Weinkauf and the Public Administrator to appear and show why surcharges should not be imposed for failure to submit an Order After Hearing. The return date is May 4, 2010 at 9:00 a.m, in Dept. 204.

Judge Pro Temp: Sue M. Kaplan. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy Clauzel.
